languages.text: "Не так быстро". {n}Капитан блюстителей появляется рядом с вами так неожиданно, что кажется, будто он соткался из воздуха.{/n} "У меня есть вопросы и к тебе, сержант, и к тво{mf|ему|ей} визави".
languages.translation_comment:

Появляется Изимонд

Выдаем Obj2_Cl_IzimondIntervention

Появляется Изимонд

languages.text: "Not so fast." {n}The enforcer captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."
languages.original_text: "Не так быстро". {n}Капитан блюстителей появляется рядом с вами так неожиданно, что кажется, будто он соткался из воздуха.{/n} "У меня есть вопросы и к тебе, сержант, и к тво{mf|ему|ей} визави".

traits.locale_text: "Not so fast." {n}The warden captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."
"Not so fast." {n}The warden captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."
"Not so fast." {n}The warden captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."

languages.text: «No tan rápido». {n}El capitán de los guardias aparece junto a ti tan de repente como si se hubiera materializado de la nada.{/n} «Tengo preguntas para usted, sargento, y también para su colega».
languages.original_text: "Not so fast." {n}The enforcer captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."

traits.locale_text: «No tan rápido». {n}El capitán de los guardias aparece junto a ti tan de repente como si se hubiera materializado de la nada.{/n} «Tengo preguntas para usted, sargento, y también para su colega».

languages.text: “先别急。”{n}执法者上尉突然出现在你身边，就像是凭空出现一般。{/n}“我有问题要问你，军士，还有你的这位熟人。”
languages.original_text: "Not so fast." {n}The enforcer captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."

traits.locale_text: “先别急。”{n}执法者上尉突然出现在你身边，就像是凭空出现一般。{/n}“我有问题要问你，军士，还有你的这位熟人。”

languages.text: « Pas si vite... » {n}Le capitaine des prévôts apparaît subitement à vos côtés, comme surgi de nulle part.{/n} « J'ai des questions à vous poser, sergent, à vous et à votre comparse ici {mf|présent|présente}. »
languages.original_text: "Not so fast." {n}The enforcer captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."

traits.locale_text: « Pas si vite... » {n}Le capitaine des prévôts apparaît subitement à vos côtés, comme surgi de nulle part.{/n} « J'ai des questions à vous poser, sergent, à vous et à votre comparse ici {mf|présent|présente}. »

languages.text: "O kadar çabuk değil." {n}İnfazcı yüzbaşı, sanki yoktan varolmuşçasına yanınızda aniden beliriyor.{/n} "Sana ve buradaki tanıdığına soracaklarım var Çavuş."
languages.original_text: "Not so fast." {n}The enforcer captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."

traits.locale_text: "O kadar çabuk değil." {n}İnfazcı yüzbaşı, sanki yoktan varolmuşçasına yanınızda aniden beliriyor.{/n} "Sana ve buradaki tanıdığına soracaklarım var Çavuş."

languages.text: "Nicht so schnell!" {n}Der Enforcer-Captain tritt so plötzlich neben dich, als wäre er aus dem Nichts gekommen.{/n} "Ich habe eine Frage an Euch, Sergeant, und an Euren Begleiter hier."
languages.original_text: "Not so fast." {n}The enforcer captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."

traits.locale_text: "Nicht so schnell! {n}Der Enforcer-Captain tritt so plötzlich neben dich, als wäre er aus dem Nichts gekommen.{/n} "Ich habe eine Frage an Euch, Sergeant, und an Euren Begleiter hier."

languages.text: 「待て」{n}突然現れた執行官の隊長が、まるで空から現れたかのようにあなたの横に現れた。{/n}「あなたと、あなたの知り合いに質問がある」
languages.original_text: "Not so fast." {n}The enforcer captain appears beside you so suddenly, it is as if he materialised out of thin air.{/n} "I have questions for you, Sergeant, and for your acquaintance here."
